description_long: This is a modern, boxy house set on a rectangular grassy plot with a paved driveway and walkway leading to the main entrance. The house features a flat roof with a visible skylight or rooftop structure, and a prominent overhang shading the front entry. The exterior is primarily white with some wooden or brown accent elements, especially near the entryway and possibly on the roof terrace. Windows are arranged in a linear, horizontal fashion, providing a sleek and minimalist appearance. The house appears to be a single-story structure with clean lines and a strong geometric form. The surrounding landscape is simple, emphasizing the house's contemporary design.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, and wooden accents, set on a grassy plot with a paved driveway and walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, overhang, driveway, and a portion of the flat roof with rooftop features.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's rectangular shape, flat roof, and the continuation of the driveway and walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, flat roof, and the full extent of the grassy plot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, window arrangement, and the intersection of the driveway and walkway.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with overhang, steps, and minimalistic door design
